title: Identify the Greatest Common Divisor (GCD)
text: To simplify a fraction, find the greatest common divisor (GCD) of the numerator and the denominator. What is the GCD of $$45$$ and 60?

title: Calculate the GCD
text: List the factors of $$45$$ and $$60$$. The GCD is the largest factor they have in common.

title: Divide by the GCD
text: Divide both the numerator and the denominator by their GCD to simplify the fraction.

title: Simplify the Fraction
text: Divide $$-45$$ by $$15$$ and $$60$$ by $$15$$ to simplify the fraction.

title: Check Your Work
text: Ensure that the simplified fraction cannot be reduced further by checking if the numerator and denominator have any common factors other than $$1$$.
